headline: Is It Time To Revisit ResMed (RMD) After Recent Share Price Weakness?
summary: Wondering whether ResMed at around US$220 a share looks like a bargain or a potential value trap? This article walks through what the current price actually reflects about the business. The stock has been volatile recently, with a 3.5% decline over the last 7 days, a 14.1% decline over 30 days, and returns of 10.1% lower year to date. The 1 year return sits at 0.8% lower and the 3 and 5 year returns are 3.3% and 17.7% respectively. These moves have kept attention on how the market is pricing...
